message:
fix: surface os.Stat errors in ProvisionFormulas and add Error counter to HealthReport (gt-2dtpx)

ProvisionFormulas silently swallowed non-IsNotExist os.Stat errors (e.g.
permission denied), causing formulas to be skipped with no indication.
Now returns the error instead of continuing silently.

HealthReport.CheckFormulaHealth set status to "error" for unreadable files
but had no Error counter to track them. Added Error field and increment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
